data.title: Boeing: Goldman Sees Minimal Impact From China Delivery Freeze, Points To Strong Asia Demand
data.description: Goldman Sachs analyst retains Buy rating on Boeing with $213 price forecast. Chinese airline halt may have minimal impact as China is a small market.

data.title: Russia Reportedly Looking Into Creating Its Own Stablecoin
data.description: Russia is exploring the creation of its own stablecoins following the recent freeze of digital wallets linked to Russian entities, which held large amounts of the USDT (CRYP

data.title: I'm Going to Say No': Powell Rejects Idea Fed Would Rescue Falling Markets (UPDATED)
What's Going On With Vista Energy Shares Wednesday?
data.description: Vista stock is trading higher on Wednesday after the company announced it will acquire Petronas E&P Argentina.

data.title: 11th Benzinga Fintech Deal Day & Awards Returns To NYC, November 10: Award Applications Now Open
data.description: Benzinga's flagship Fintech Deal Day & Awards is back in New York City this November. Applications are now open for the 11th annual competition recognizing innovation in financial technology.
